sourcesContent:
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";
const LOGO = "data:image/png;base64,";

const ADDR = "Arenja Arcade Premises, Office No. 112, Sector 17, 1st Floor, Above Dominos Pizza, Vashi, Navi Mumbai - 400704";
const NAV = ["Home","Services","About","Careers","Contact"];
const IT = ["Python Developer","Java Developer",".NET Developer","C++ Developer","Full Stack Developer","Front-End Developer","Back-End Developer","Angular Developer","React.js Developer","Node.js Developer","PHP Developer","Android Developer","iOS Developer","Mobile App Developer","Software Engineer","Software Architect","UI/UX Designer","Graphic Designer","Web Designer","QA Engineer","Software Tester","Automation Tester","Manual Tester","DevOps Engineer","Cloud Engineer","AWS Engineer","Azure Engineer","Data Analyst","Data Scientist","AI/ML Engineer","Cyber Security Specialist","Network Engineer","Database Administrator","SQL Developer","SAP Consultant","ERP Specialist","Technical Support Engineer","IT Helpdesk Executive","Business Analyst","Scrum Master","Project Manager","Product Manager","Blockchain Developer","Embedded Systems Engineer","Game Developer","CRM Developer","Salesforce Developer","SharePoint Developer"];
const NONIT = ["HR Manager","HR Recruiter","HR Operations Executive","HR Generalist","Operations Manager","Assistant Manager","General Manager","Vice President (VP)","Business Development Executive","Customer Relationship Executive","Customer Support Executive","Receptionist","Accountant","Store Manager","Counter Sales Executive","Retail Sales Executive","Godown Manager","Warehouse Manager","Administrative Executive","Office Coordinator","Team Leader","Backend Executive","Telecaller","BPO Executive","Logistics Coordinator"];
const SVCS = [
  {ic:"🎯",t:"IT Recruitment",tag:"IT",d:"End-to-end hiring for 50+ IT roles — developers, architects, AI/ML, DevOps, cloud and cybersecurity across PAN India.",pts:["Python, Java, React, Angular, Node.js","AI/ML, DevOps, Cloud Engineers","Cybersecurity, Data Science, Blockchain","QA, SAP, ERP, Salesforce Specialists"]},
  {ic:"👥",t:"Non-IT Recruitment",tag:"Non-IT",d:"Cross-industry Non-IT hiring from entry-level to senior leadership — BFSI, FMCG, Manufacturing, BPO.",pts:["Finance, Sales & Business Development","HR, Operations & Administration","BPO & Customer Support Roles","Logistics, Retail & Manufacturing"]},
  {ic:"💰",t:"Payroll Management",tag:"Payroll",d:"Complete HR & Payroll — salary processing, statutory compliance, PF/ESIC and professional tax.",pts:["Salary Structuring & Processing","PF, ESIC & Professional Tax","Labour Law & Statutory Compliance","Full & Final Settlements"]},
  {ic:"⚙️",t:"Software Development",tag:"Software",d:"Custom software — CRM, ERP, mobile apps, web platforms and AI integrations.",pts:["Custom CRM & ERP Solutions","Mobile Apps (iOS & Android)","Web Applications & Portals","AI Integration & Automation Tools"]},
  {ic:"📞",t:"BPO & Outsourcing",tag:"BPO",d:"500+ BPO workforce experience. International & domestic voice, customer service, lead generation.",pts:["International Voice Process","Customer Service Operations","Lead Generation Campaigns","Email, Chat & Backend Support"]},
];
const JOBS = [
  {id:1,title:"Senior AI/ML Engineer",loc:"Navi Mumbai / Remote",exp:"4-8 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"IT",hot:true},
  {id:2,title:"Full Stack Developer (React + Node)",loc:"Mumbai / Hybrid",exp:"2-5 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"IT",hot:false},
  {id:3,title:"DevOps / Cloud Architect",loc:"Remote",exp:"5-9 yrs",type:"Contract",dept:"IT",hot:true},
  {id:4,title:"Cybersecurity Engineer",loc:"Mumbai",exp:"3-7 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"IT",hot:false},
  {id:5,title:"React.js / Angular Developer",loc:"Navi Mumbai",exp:"2-4 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"IT",hot:true},
  {id:6,title:"Data Scientist / Data Analyst",loc:"Mumbai / Remote",exp:"3-6 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"IT",hot:false},
  {id:7,title:"HR Manager",loc:"Navi Mumbai",exp:"5-8 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:false},
  {id:8,title:"Operations Manager",loc:"Mumbai",exp:"6-10 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:false},
  {id:9,title:"Business Development Executive",loc:"Pan India",exp:"2-5 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:true},
  {id:10,title:"BPO Team Leader",loc:"Navi Mumbai",exp:"3-5 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:false},
  {id:11,title:"Senior Finance Manager",loc:"Navi Mumbai",exp:"7-12 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:false},
  {id:12,title:"Accountant",loc:"Mumbai",exp:"2-4 yrs",type:"Full-Time",dept:"Non-IT",hot:false},
];
const TESTI = [
  {name:"Rajiv Mehta",role:"CTO, FinTech Startup",txt:"A-CONNEXION delivered 3 senior developers in under 10 days. Pre-screened candidates saved us weeks of effort. Truly exceptional!"},
  {name:"Anita Sharma",role:"HR Head, Manufacturing Co.",txt:"Outstanding Non-IT recruitment for our operations team. Quality candidates and excellent communication throughout."},
  {name:"David Chen",role:"VP Engineering, SaaS Platform",txt:"Our go-to recruitment partner for 2+ years. They understand technical hiring deeply. Highly recommended!"},
];

const G = `
@keyframes fu{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
@keyframes bn{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-4px);}}
.fu{animation:fu 0.5s ease both;}
.bp{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7);color:#fff;border:none;padding:12px 28px;border-radius:50px;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(56,189,248,0.4);transition:all 0.2s;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;}
.bp:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(56,189,248,0.55);}
.bw{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#fff;color:#0284C7;border:none;padding:12px 28px;border-radius:50px;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 3px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);transition:all 0.2s;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;}
.bw:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);}
.bg{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;border:1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5);padding:11px 26px;border-radius:50px;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;}
.bg:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.28);}
.bwa{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:#25D366;color:#fff;border:none;padding:10px 22px;border-radius:50px;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:all 0.2s;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;}
.bwa:hover{background:#22BF5C;transform:translateY(-2px);}
.card{background:#fff;border-radius:18px;border:1px solid #E0F2FE;box-shadow:0 2px 16px rgba(14,165,233,0.06);transition:transform 0.2s,box-shadow 0.2s;overflow:hidden;}
.card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:0 14px 42px rgba(14,165,233,0.14);}
.inp{width:100%;background:#F8FAFF;border:1.5px solid #BAE6FD;color:#0F172A;padding:12px 15px;border-radius:11px;font-size:14px;transition:all 0.18s;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;}
.inp:focus{border-color:#38BDF8;background:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(56,189,248,0.1);}
.inp::placeholder{color:#94A3B8;}
.jrow{background:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:18px 22px;border:1px solid #E0F2FE;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;transition:all 0.2s;}
.jrow:hover{border-color:#38BDF8;box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(14,165,233,0.12);}
.pill{padding:3px 11px;border-radius:50px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;}
.nl{background:transparent;color:#fff;border:none;border-bottom:3px solid transparent;padding:13px 22px;cursor:pointer;font-weight:500;font-size:13px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all 0.18s;opacity:0.8;font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;}
.nl:hover,.nl.act{opacity:1;border-bottom-color:#fff;font-weight:700;}
.lbl{display:inline-block;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#EFF9FF,#DBEAFE);color:#0EA5E9;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:5px 15px;border-radius:50px;border:1px solid #BAE6FD;margin-bottom:12px;}
*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{font-family:Poppins,sans-serif;background:#F0F9FF;color:#0F172A;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#E0F2FE;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:linear-gradient(#38BDF8,#0EA5E9);border-radius:4px;}
`;

function injectG(){
  if(document.getElementById("ac-g"))return;
  const s=document.createElement("style");
  s.id="ac-g";s.textContent=G;
  document.head.appendChild(s);
}

export default function AConnexion(){
  const [pg,setPg]=useState("Home");
  const [jf,setJf]=useState("All");
  const [pt,setPt]=useState("IT");
  const [aj,setAj]=useState(null);
  const [done,setDone]=useState(false);
  const [fm,setFm]=useState({name:"",email:"",phone:"",exp:"",cover:"",file:null});
  const [cf,setCf]=useState({name:"",email:"",phone:"",sub:"Hiring Enquiry",msg:""});
  const [cs,setCs]=useState(false);
  const [co,setCo]=useState(false);
  const [msgs,setMsgs]=useState([{from:"bot",text:"Hello! 👋 Welcome to A-CONNEXION Tech International!\n\nEst. 2005 · 20+ Years · 3,000+ Placements\n\nHow can I help you today?",quick:["Browse Jobs","IT Recruitment","Our Address","Contact Us"]}]);
  const [ci,setCi]=useState("");
  const [tp,setTp]=useState(false);
  const [ti,setTi]=useState(0);
  const [sc,setSc]=useState(false);
  const ce=useRef(null);
  const fr=useRef(null);

  useEffect(()=>{injectG();},[]);
  useEffect(()=>{const t=setInterval(()=>setTi(i=>(i+1)%TESTI.length),4500);return()=>clearInterval(t);},[]);
  useEffect(()=>{ce.current?.scrollIntoView({behavior:"smooth"});},[msgs,tp]);
  useEffect(()=>{const fn=()=>setSc(window.scrollY>20);window.addEventListener("scroll",fn);return()=>window.removeEventListener("scroll",fn);},[]);

  const go=p=>{setPg(p);setAj(null);setDone(false);window.scrollTo(0,0);};

  const chat=txt=>{
    const q=txt||ci.trim();if(!q)return;
    setMsgs(m=>[...m,{from:"user",text:q}]);setCi("");setTp(true);
    const ql=q.toLowerCase();
    let r="Thank you! Call +91 9869043500 or email info@aconnexion.in 😊";
    if(ql.includes("address")||ql.includes("location")||ql.includes("office"))
      r="📍 Our Office:\n\n"+ADDR+"\n\n📞 +91 9869043500\n📧 info@aconnexion.in";
    else if(ql.includes("job")||ql.includes("career")||ql.includes("opening"))
      r="We have 12+ live openings!\n\n→ Click Careers in the menu\n→ Filter by IT or Non-IT\n→ Click Apply Now\n\nOr WhatsApp CV: +91 9869043500";
    else if(ql.includes("it")||ql.includes("developer")||ql.includes("engineer"))
      r="We recruit 50+ IT roles:\n• Full Stack, React, Angular\n• AI/ML, DevOps, Cloud\n• Cybersecurity, Data Science\n• Blockchain, SAP, ERP\n\nVisit Careers to apply!";
    else if(ql.includes("payroll")||ql.includes("salary")||ql.includes("pf"))
      r="Our Payroll Services:\n✓ Salary Processing\n✓ PF & ESIC Management\n✓ Professional Tax\n✓ Labour Law Compliance";
    else if(ql.includes("contact")||ql.includes("phone")||ql.includes("email"))
      r="📞 +91 9869043500\n📞 +91 8897123500\n📧 info@aconnexion.in\n\n📍 "+ADDR;
    else if(ql.includes("hello")||ql.includes("hi"))
      r="Hello! 👋 I can help with:\n• IT & Non-IT Recruitment\n• Software Development\n• Payroll Management\n• BPO Services\n\nWhat do you need?";
    setTimeout(()=>{setTp(false);setMsgs(m=>[...m,{from:"bot",text:r}]);},750);
  };

  const PH=({label,title,sub})=>(
    <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7,#075985)",padding:"60px 40px 44px"}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto"}}>
        <span className="lbl" style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.13)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.9)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"}}>{label}</span>
        <h1 style={{fontSize:"clamp(28px,4vw,52px)",fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1.08,marginTop:8,marginBottom:10}}>{title}</h1>
        <div style={{width:50,height:4,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.4)",borderRadius:2,marginBottom:13}}/>
        {sub&&<p style={{fontSize:15,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.7)",maxWidth:540,lineHeight:1.78}}>{sub}</p>}
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  const Navbar=()=>(
    <header style={{position:"fixed",top:0,left:0,right:0,zIndex:1000,boxShadow:sc?"0 4px 28px rgba(14,165,233,0.15)":"none",transition:"box-shadow 0.3s"}}>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #E0F2FE"}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto",padding:"4px 36px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
          <div onClick={()=>go("Home")} style={{cursor:"pointer",height:84,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:14}}>
            <img src={LOGO} alt="A-CONNEXION" style={{height:70,width:"auto",objectFit:"contain",display:"block",filter:"brightness(0) saturate(100%)"}}/>
            <div style={{borderLeft:"2px solid #E0F2FE",paddingLeft:14}}>
              <div style={{fontWeight:900,fontSize:18,color:"#CC0000",letterSpacing:1,lineHeight:1.1,fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}>A-CONNEXION</div>
              <div style={{fontWeight:600,fontSize:10,color:"#0F172A",letterSpacing:2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginTop:2,fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}>Tech International</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:14}}>
            <a href="tel:+919869043500" style={{textDecoration:"none",color:"#334155",fontWeight:600,fontSize:13,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6}}>
              📞 +91 9869043500
            </a>
            <a href="https://wa.me/919869043500" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">
              <button className="bwa" style={{padding:"8px 18px",fontSize:12}}>💬 WhatsApp</button>
            </a>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7,#0369A1)",boxShadow:"0 2px 10px rgba(2,132,199,0.35)"}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto",padding:"0 36px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center"}}>
          {NAV.map(n=>(
            <button key={n} className={"nl"+(pg===n?" act":"")} onClick={()=>go(n)}>{n}</button>
          ))}
          <div style={{flex:1}}/>
          <button onClick={()=>go("Contact")} style={{background:"#fff",color:"#0284C7",border:"none",borderRadius:5,padding:"9px 20px",fontSize:12,fontWeight:700,cursor:"pointer",fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}>🚀 Hire Talent</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>
  );

  const Home=()=>(
    <div className="fu">
      <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7 0%,#0369A1 40%,#075985 100%)",minHeight:"100vh",padding:"170px 40px 80px",position:"relative",overflow:"hidden",display:"flex",alignItems:"center"}}>
        <div style={{position:"absolute",inset:0,backgroundImage:"radial-gradient(circle at 2px 2px,rgba(255,255,255,0.07) 1px,transparent 0)",backgroundSize:"40px 40px",pointerEvents:"none"}}/>
        <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto",width:"100%",display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1.15fr 0.85fr",gap:72,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div>
            <div style={{display:"inline-flex",alignItems:"center",gap:8,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.12)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25)",borderRadius:50,padding:"7px 17px",marginBottom:28}}>
              <span style={{width:8,height:8,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#7DD3FC",display:"inline-block"}}/>
              <span style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.9)",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1.5}}>ESTABLISHED 2005 · 20+ YEARS OF EXCELLENCE</span>
            </div>
            <h1 style={{fontSize:"clamp(38px,5vw,66px)",fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1.06,letterSpacing:-1,marginBottom:20}}>
              Where Talent<br/><span style={{color:"#BAE6FD"}}>Meets</span><br/>Opportunity
            </h1>
            <p style={{fontSize:16,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.72)",lineHeight:1.85,maxWidth:500,marginBottom:38}}>
              Strategic recruitment & talent advisory — IT staffing, Non-IT hiring, payroll management, software development and BPO services across India.
            </p>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,flexWrap:"wrap",marginBottom:52}}>
              <button className="bw" onClick={()=>go("Careers")}>Explore Jobs →</button>
              <button className="bg" onClick={()=>go("Services")}>Our Services</button>
              <a href="https://wa.me/919869043500" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><button className="bwa">💬 WhatsApp</button></a>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)",borderTop:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14)",paddingTop:32}}>
              {[["3,000+","Placements"],["84%","Retention"],["20+","Years"],["500+","BPO"]].map(([n,l],i)=>(
                <div key={l} style={{paddingRight:i<3?20:0,paddingLeft:i>0?20:0,borderRight:i<3?"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14)":"none"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:30,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1}}>{n}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.5)",marginTop:4}}>{l}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:13}}>
            <div style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.11)",backdropFilter:"blur(16px)",borderRadius:18,padding:22,border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"}}>
              <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:14,color:"#fff",marginBottom:12}}>🎯 IT & Non-IT Recruitment</div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:6}}>
                {["AI/ML Engineer","Full Stack Dev","DevOps","Data Scientist","HR Manager","BPO Lead"].map(t=>(
                  <span key={t} className="pill" style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.14)",color:"#fff",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"}}>{t}</span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:11}}>
              {[["⚙️","Software Dev","CRM, ERP, Mobile"],["💰","Payroll","PF, ESIC, Tax"],["📞","BPO Services","500+ Workforce"],["🌐","Web Dev","Sites & Portals"]].map(([ic,t,d])=>(
                <div key={t} style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.09)",borderRadius:13,padding:15,border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14)",cursor:"pointer"}} onClick={()=>go("Services")}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:20,marginBottom:6}}>{ic}</div>
                  <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:13,color:"#fff"}}>{t}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"rgba(186,230,253,0.7)",marginTop:3}}>{d}</div>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <div style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.95)",borderRadius:13,padding:"13px 17px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10}}>
              <span style={{width:9,height:9,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#22C55E",display:"inline-block"}}/>
              <span style={{color:"#0369A1",fontSize:13,fontWeight:700}}>Actively Hiring · {JOBS.length} Open Positions</span>
              <button className="bp" onClick={()=>go("Careers")} style={{marginLeft:"auto",padding:"6px 14px",fontSize:11}}>View All</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",borderBottom:"1px solid #E0F2FE"}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto",display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(4,1fr)"}}>
          {[["3,000+","Placements","🎯"],["84%","Retention","⭐"],["20+","Years","🏆"],["500+","BPO","📞"]].map(([n,l,ic],i)=>(
            <div key={l} style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"22px 16px",borderRight:i<3?"1px solid #E0F2FE":"none"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:20,marginBottom:3}}>{ic}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:30,fontWeight:900,color:"#0284C7",lineHeight:1}}>{n}</div>
              <div style={{fontSize:11.5,color:"#64748B",marginTop:4,fontWeight:500}}>{l}</div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#F0F9FF",padding:"72px 40px"}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto"}}>
          <div style={{textAlign:"center",marginBottom:48}}>
            <span className="lbl">WHAT WE OFFER</span>
            <h2 style={{fontSize:"clamp(26px,4vw,44px)",fontWeight:800,color:"#0F172A",marginTop:4}}>Comprehensive Solutions</h2>
            <div style={{width:50,height:4,background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",borderRadius:2,margin:"14px auto 0"}}/>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr))",gap:20}}>
            {SVCS.map(s=>(
              <div key={s.t} className="card" style={{padding:"26px 22px",cursor:"pointer",borderTop:"3px solid #38BDF8"}} onClick={()=>go("Services")}>
                <div style={{width:52,height:52,borderRadius:14,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#EFF9FF,#DBEAFE)",border:"1px solid #BAE6FD",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:24,marginBottom:16}}>{s.ic}</div>
                <div style={{fontWeight:800,fontSize:16,color:"#0F172A",marginBottom:8}}>{s.t}</div>
                <p style={{fontSize:13,color:"#64748B",lineHeight:1.75,marginBottom:12}}>{s.d}</p>
                <div style={{color:"#0EA5E9",fontSize:13,fontWeight:600}}>Learn more →</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7,#075985)",padding:"72px 40px"}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:860,margin:"0 auto",textAlign:"center"}}>
          <h2 style={{fontSize:"clamp(26px,4vw,44px)",fontWeight:800,color:"#fff",marginBottom:42}}>Trusted by Leaders</h2>
          <div style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.1)",backdropFilter:"blur(18px)",borderRadius:22,padding:"38px 48px",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"}}>
            <div style={{fontSize:48,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.18)",lineHeight:1,marginBottom:8,textAlign:"left"}}>"</div>
            <p style={{fontSize:17,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.88)",lineHeight:1.82,fontStyle:"italic",marginBottom:28}}>{TESTI[ti].txt}</p>
            <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:14,color:"#fff"}}>{TESTI[ti].name}</div>
            <div style={{fontSize:12.5,color:"rgba(186,230,253,0.75)",marginTop:3}}>{TESTI[ti].role}</div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",justifyContent:"center",gap:7,marginTop:24}}>
            {TESTI.map((_,i)=>(<button key={i} onClick={()=>setTi(i)} style={{width:i===ti?26:8,height:8,borderRadius:4,background:i===ti?"#fff":"rgba(255,255,255,0.28)",border:"none",cursor:"pointer",transition:"all 0.28s",padding:0}}/>))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",padding:"64px 40px",textAlign:"center"}}>
        <h2 style={{fontSize:"clamp(26px,4vw,46px)",fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",marginBottom:12}}>Ready to Hire or Find Your Dream Role?</h2>
        <p style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.82)",fontSize:16,marginBottom:32}}>Browse live IT & Non-IT openings. Professional talent delivered with speed.</p>
        <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,justifyContent:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
          <button className="bw" onClick={()=>go("Careers")} style={{fontSize:14,padding:"13px 30px"}}>Browse All Jobs →</button>
          <a href="https://wa.me/919869043500" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><button className="bg" style={{fontSize:14,padding:"12px 28px"}}>💬 WhatsApp Resume</button></a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  const Services=()=>(
    <div className="fu" style={{paddingTop:153}}>
      <PH label="WHAT WE DO" title="Our Services" sub="Complete recruitment, payroll, software and BPO services."/>
      <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto",padding:"56px 40px"}}>
        {SVCS.map((s,i)=>(
          <div key={s.t} className="card" style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",marginBottom:22}}>
            <div style={{padding:"44px 40px",order:i%2===0?0:1}}>
              <div style={{width:56,height:56,borderRadius:16,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#EFF9FF,#DBEAFE)",border:"1px solid #BAE6FD",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:26,marginBottom:18}}>{s.ic}</div>
              <span className="lbl">{s.tag}</span>
              <h2 style={{fontSize:26,fontWeight:800,color:"#0F172A",marginTop:8,marginBottom:10}}>{s.t}</h2>
              <div style={{width:38,height:4,background:"linear-gradient(90deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",borderRadius:2,marginBottom:18}}/>
              <p style={{fontSize:14.5,color:"#64748B",lineHeight:1.85,marginBottom:26}}>{s.d}</p>
              <button className="bp" onClick={()=>go("Contact")}>Get Started →</button>
            </div>
            <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#F0F9FF,#E0F2FE)",padding:"44px 40px",order:i%2===0?1:0,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",justifyContent:"center"}}>
              <div style={{fontWeight:700,fontSize:11,color:"#0284C7",letterSpacing:2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:16}}>Key Highlights</div>
              {s.pts.map(p=>(
                <div key={p} style={{display:"flex",gap:11,marginBottom:13,alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                  <div style={{width:22,height:22,borderRadius:"50%",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",color:"#fff",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>✓</div>
                  <span style={{fontSize:13.5,color:"#334155",lineHeight:1.55}}>{p}</span>
                </div>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  const About=()=>(
    <div className="fu" style={{paddingTop:153}}>
      <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7,#075985)",padding:"72px 40px"}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto",display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1.15fr 0.85fr",gap:64,alignItems:"center"}}>
          <div>
            <span className="lbl" style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.13)",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.9)",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.2)"}}>ABOUT US</span>
            <h1 style={{fontSize:"clamp(28px,4vw,52px)",fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1.08,marginTop:8,marginBottom:10}}>Connecting Exceptional Minds<br/>with Leading Companies</h1>
            <div style={{width:50,height:4,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.4)",borderRadius:2,margin:"14px 0 24px"}}/>
            <p style={{fontSize:15.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.73)",lineHeight:1.88,marginBottom:12}}>A-CONNEXION Tech International — established in 2005. With 20+ years of experience, we partner with leadership teams to build scalable hiring ecosystems across PAN India & International.</p>
            <p style={{fontSize:15.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.73)",lineHeight:1.88}}>Your <strong style={{color:"#BAE6FD"}}>Extended Talent Acquisition Partner</strong> — IT, Non-IT, Payroll, Software & BPO.</p>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:13}}>
            {[["20+","Years","🏆"],["3,000+","Placements","🎯"],["84%","Retention","⭐"],["500+","BPO","📞"]].map(([n,l,ic])=>(
              <div key={l} style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.11)",backdropFilter:"blur(14px)",borderRadius:18,padding:"26px 18px",textAlign:"center",border:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"}}>
                <div style={{fontSize:19,marginBottom:5}}>{ic}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:36,fontWeight:900,color:"#fff",lineHeight:1}}>{n}</div>
                <div style={{fontSize:11.5,color:"rgba(186,230,253,0.75)",marginTop:5}}>{l}</div>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style={{background:"#fff",padding:"72px 40px"}}>
        <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto",display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:64}}>
          <div>
            <span className="lbl">LEADERSHIP</span>
            <h2 style={{fontSize:28,fontWeight:800,color:"#0F172A",marginTop:8,marginBottom:24}}>Our Background</h2>
            {["Managed 350+ employee call center","End-to-end recruitment lifecycle","Business operations & delivery","Hiring strategy & workforce planning","International — USA, Canada & India"].map(b=>(
              <div key={b} style={{display:"flex",gap:13,marginBottom:14,padding:"13px 15px",background:"#F0F9FF",borderRadius:11,border:"1px solid #E0F2FE",alignItems:"flex-start"}}>
                <div style={{width:22,height:22,borderRadius:"50%",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",color:"#fff",fontSize:10,fontWeight:700,flexShrink:0}}>✓</div>
                <span style={{fontSize:13.5,color:"#334155",lineHeight:1.55}}>{b}</span>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
          <div>
            <span className="lbl">CORE STRENGTHS</span>
            <h2 style={{fontSize:28,fontWeight:800,color:"#0F172A",marginTop:8,marginBottom:24}}>Why We Stand Out</h2>
            <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:11,marginBottom:26}}>
              {["IT Technology Hiring","Non-IT Cross-Industry","International Hiring","BPO Operations","End-to-End Payroll","Custom Software","Fast Turnaround","Scalable Solutions"].map(f=>(
                <div key={f} style={{background:"#F0F9FF",border:"1px solid #BAE6FD",borderRadius:11,padding:"11px 13px",fontSize:12.5,color:"#0F172A",fontWeight:600,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:7}}>◆ {f}</div>
              ))}
            </div>
            <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7,#075985)",borderRadius:16,padding:"26px 22px"}}>
              <p style={{fontSize:15.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.88)",fontStyle:"italic",lineHeight:1.72,marginBottom:11}}>At our core, we are matchmakers. Every placement is more than a job — it is a career move that matters.</p>
              <span style={{fontSize:11.5,color:"rgba(186,230,253,0.8)",fontWeight:700}}>— Akshay Arun Naik, Founder & MD</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  const Careers=()=>{
    const fil=JOBS.filter(j=>jf==="All"||j.dept===jf);
    if(aj){
      return(
        <div className="fu" style={{paddingTop:153,background:"#F0F9FF",minHeight:"100vh"}}>
          <div style={{maxWidth:780,margin:"0 auto",padding:"44px 40px"}}>
            <button onClick={()=>{setAj(null);setDone(false);}} style={{background:"none",border:"none",color:"#0284C7",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:14,fontWeight:600,marginBottom:22,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:6,fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}>← Back to Jobs</button>
            {done?(
              <div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"56px 24px",background:"#fff",borderRadius:22,boxShadow:"0 6px 36px rgba(14,165,233,0.1)",border:"1px solid #BAE6FD"}}>
                <div style={{width:80,height:80,borderRadius:"50%",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:36,margin:"0 auto 22px",color:"#fff"}}>✓</div>
                <h2 style={{fontSize:34,fontWeight:800,color:"#0F172A",marginBottom:10}}>Application Submitted! 🎉</h2>
                <p style={{color:"#64748B",fontSize:15,marginBottom:8}}>Thank you <strong>{fm.name}</strong>!</p>
                <p style={{color:"#64748B",fontSize:14,marginBottom:28}}>We will contact you at <strong>{fm.phone||fm.email}</strong> within <strong>24 hours</strong>.</p>
                <div style={{background:"#F0F9FF",borderRadius:12,padding:"16px 20px",marginBottom:28,textAlign:"left"}}>
                  <div style={{fontSize:12,color:"#64748B",fontWeight:600,marginBottom:8,textTransform:"uppercase",letterSpacing:1}}>Application Summary</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"#0F172A",marginBottom:4}}>💼 Role: <strong>{aj.title}</strong></div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"#0F172A",marginBottom:4}}>📍 Location: <strong>{aj.loc}</strong></div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"#0F172A"}}>📅 Applied: <strong>{new Date().toLocaleDateString("en-IN")}</strong></div>
                </div>
                <div style={{display:"flex",gap:12,justifyContent:"center",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                  <button className="bp" onClick={()=>{setAj(null);setDone(false);setFm({name:"",email:"",phone:"",exp:"",cover:"",file:null});}}>Apply Another Role</button>
                  <a href="https://wa.me/919869043500" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><button className="bwa">💬 WhatsApp Resume</button></a>
                </div>
              </div>
            ):(
              <>
                <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7,#075985)",borderRadius:14,padding:"20px 24px",marginBottom:26}}>
                  <div style={{fontWeight:800,fontSize:18,color:"#fff",marginBottom:4}}>{aj.title}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:13,color:"rgba(186,230,253,0.82)"}}>📍 {aj.loc} · ⏱ {aj.exp} · 📋 {aj.type}</div>
                </div>
                <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:22,padding:"40px 38px",boxShadow:"0 6px 36px rgba(14,165,233,0.1)",border:"1px solid #BAE6FD"}}>
                  <h2 style={{fontSize:28,fontWeight:800,color:"#0F172A",marginBottom:6}}>Apply for This Role</h2>
                  <p style={{color:"#64748B",fontSize:13.5,marginBottom:26}}>Fill your details — we will contact you within 24 hours.</p>
                  <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:14,marginBottom:14}}>
                    {[["name","Full Name *"],["email","Email Address *"],["phone","Phone Number *"],["exp","Years of Experience"]].map(([k,pl])=>(
                      <div key={k}>
                        <label style={{display:"block",fontSize:10.5,color:"#94A3B8",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:5}}>{pl}</label>
                        <input className="inp" placeholder={pl} value={fm[k]} onChange={e=>setFm({...fm,[k]:e.target.value})}/>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                  <div style={{marginBottom:14}}>
                    <label style={{display:"block",fontSize:10.5,color:"#94A3B8",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:5}}>Applying For</label>
                    <input className="inp" value={aj.title} readOnly style={{background:"#F0F9FF",color:"#0284C7",fontWeight:600}}/>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{marginBottom:14}}>
                    <label style={{display:"block",fontSize:10.5,color:"#94A3B8",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:5}}>Cover Message</label>
                    <textarea className="inp" rows={4} style={{resize:"vertical"}} placeholder="Why are you a great fit for this role?" value={fm.cover} onChange={e=>setFm({...fm,cover:e.target.value})}/>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{marginBottom:26}}>
                    <label style={{display:"block",fontSize:10.5,color:"#94A3B8",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:5}}>Upload Resume</label>
                    <div onClick={()=>fr.current?.click()} style={{border:"2px dashed #BAE6FD",borderRadius:13,padding:28,textAlign:"center",cursor:"pointer",background:"#F8FAFF"}}
                      onMouseEnter={e=>e.currentTarget.style.borderColor="#38BDF8"}
                      onMouseLeave={e=>e.currentTarget.style.borderColor="#BAE6FD"}
                    >
                      {fm.file
                        ?<div style={{color:"#22C55E",fontWeight:700,fontSize:14}}>✓ {fm.file.name}</div>
                        :<><div style={{fontSize:32,marginBottom:7}}>📎</div><div style={{color:"#64748B",fontSize:13,fontWeight:600}}>Click to Upload Resume</div><div style={{color:"#94A3B8",fontSize:11.5,marginTop:3}}>PDF, DOC, DOCX · Max 5MB</div></>}
                    </div>
                    <input ref={fr} type="file" accept=".pdf,.doc,.docx" style={{display:"none"}} onChange={e=>setFm({...fm,file:e.target.files[0]||null})}/>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{background:"#FFF7ED",borderRadius:10,padding:"12px 16px",marginBottom:22,display:"flex",gap:10,alignItems:"center"}}>
                    <span>💡</span><span style={{fontSize:12.5,color:"#92400E"}}>You can also WhatsApp your resume to <strong>+91 9869043500</strong></span>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:12}}>
                    <button className="bp" style={{justifyContent:"center",padding:14,fontSize:14}} onClick={()=>{if(fm.name&&fm.email&&fm.phone)setDone(true);else alert("Please fill Name, Email and Phone!");}}>Submit Application →</button>
                    <a href={"https://wa.me/919869043500?text=Hi, I want to apply for "+aj.title+". My name is "+(fm.name||"[Name]")+" and my number is "+(fm.phone||"[Phone]")} target="_blank" rel="noreferrer" style={{display:"block"}}>
                      <button className="bwa" style={{width:"100%",justifyContent:"center",padding:14,fontSize:14,borderRadius:11}}>💬 WhatsApp Apply</button>
                    </a>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      );
    }
    return(
      <div className="fu" style={{paddingTop:153}}>
        <PH label="CAREERS" title="Open Positions" sub={JOBS.length+" live openings — IT, Non-IT and leadership roles across India."}/>
        <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto",padding:"52px 40px"}}>
          <div style={{marginBottom:48}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:3,marginBottom:22,background:"#fff",borderRadius:13,padding:4,border:"1px solid #BAE6FD",width:"fit-content"}}>
              {["IT","Non-IT"].map(tab=>(
                <button key={tab} onClick={()=>setPt(tab)} style={{background:pt===tab?"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)":"transparent",color:pt===tab?"#fff":"#64748B",border:"none",padding:"9px 26px",borderRadius:10,cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:700,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}>
                  {tab==="IT"?"💻 IT Positions":"👥 Non-IT Positions"}
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
            <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:18,padding:26,border:"1px solid #BAE6FD"}}>
              <div style={{fontSize:11,color:"#94A3B8",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1.5,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:14}}>All {pt} Roles We Hire For:</div>
              <div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:7}}>
                {(pt==="IT"?IT:NONIT).map(p=>(
                  <span key={p} className="pill" style={{background:pt==="IT"?"#EFF6FF":"#F0FDF4",border:"1px solid "+(pt==="IT"?"#BFDBFE":"#BBF7D0"),color:pt==="IT"?"#1D4ED8":"#15803D"}}>{p}</span>
                ))}
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between",marginBottom:18,flexWrap:"wrap",gap:12}}>
            <h2 style={{fontSize:24,fontWeight:800,color:"#0F172A"}}>Live Openings <span style={{color:"#0284C7"}}>({fil.length})</span></h2>
            <div style={{display:"flex",gap:3,background:"#fff",borderRadius:11,padding:4,border:"1px solid #BAE6FD"}}>
              {["All","IT","Non-IT"].map(f=>(
                <button key={f} onClick={()=>setJf(f)} style={{background:jf===f?"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)":"transparent",color:jf===f?"#fff":"#64748B",border:"none",padding:"7px 16px",borderRadius:8,cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:600,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}>{f}</button>
              ))}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10}}>
            {fil.map(j=>(
              <div key={j.id} className="jrow" onClick={()=>{setAj(j);window.scrollTo(0,0);}} style={{cursor:"pointer"}}>
                <div style={{flex:1,minWidth:180}}>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:7,marginBottom:5,flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                    <span style={{fontWeight:800,fontSize:14.5,color:"#0F172A"}}>{j.title}</span>
                    {j.hot&&<span className="pill" style={{background:"#FEF2F2",color:"#DC2626",border:"1px solid #FECACA"}}>🔥 HOT</span>}
                    <span className="pill" style={{background:j.dept==="IT"?"#EFF6FF":"#F0FDF4",color:j.dept==="IT"?"#1D4ED8":"#15803D",border:"1px solid "+(j.dept==="IT"?"#BFDBFE":"#BBF7D0")}}>{j.dept}</span>
                  </div>
                  <div style={{display:"flex",gap:16,fontSize:12,color:"#94A3B8",flexWrap:"wrap"}}>
                    <span>📍 {j.loc}</span><span>⏱ {j.exp}</span><span>📋 {j.type}</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <button className="bp" style={{fontSize:13,padding:"10px 22px",whiteSpace:"nowrap"}} onClick={(e)=>{e.stopPropagation();setAj(j);window.scrollTo(0,0);}}>Apply Now →</button>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  };

  const Contact=()=>(
    <div className="fu" style={{paddingTop:153}}>
      <PH label="GET IN TOUCH" title="Let's Talk Talent" sub="Reach out for hiring, software development or payroll enquiries."/>
      <div style={{maxWidth:1260,margin:"0 auto",padding:"56px 40px"}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1.25fr",gap:44}}>
          <div>
            <h2 style={{fontSize:26,fontWeight:800,color:"#0F172A",marginBottom:30}}>Contact Information</h2>
            {[["📞","Phone","+91 9869043500 / +91 8897123500"],["📧","Email","info@aconnexion.in"],["👤","Director","a.naik@aconnexion.in"],["📍","Office",ADDR],["🌐","Website","www.aconnexion.in"]].map(c=>(
              <div key={c[1]} style={{display:"flex",gap:14,marginBottom:20,paddingBottom:20,borderBottom:"1px solid #F0F9FF"}}>
                <div style={{width:46,height:46,background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#EFF9FF,#DBEAFE)",border:"1px solid #BAE6FD",borderRadius:13,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:19,flexShrink:0}}>{c[0]}</div>
                <div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:10,color:"#94A3B8",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1.5,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:3}}>{c[1]}</div>
                  <div style={{fontSize:13.5,color:"#0F172A",fontWeight:500,lineHeight:1.5}}>{c[2]}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            ))}
            <a href="https://wa.me/919869043500" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">
              <div style={{background:"#25D366",borderRadius:14,padding:"16px 20px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:13,cursor:"pointer",boxShadow:"0 4px 18px rgba(37,211,102,0.22)"}}>
                <span style={{fontSize:26}}>💬</span>
                <div>
                  <div style={{color:"#fff",fontWeight:800,fontSize:14}}>WhatsApp Your Resume</div>
                  <div style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.78)",fontSize:12.5,marginTop:2}}>We respond within 24 hours</div>
                </div>
                <span style={{marginLeft:"auto",color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.55)",fontSize:20}}>→</span>
              </div>
            </a>
          </div>
          <div style={{background:"#fff",borderRadius:22,padding:"40px 38px",boxShadow:"0 6px 36px rgba(14,165,233,0.1)",border:"1px solid #BAE6FD",borderTop:"4px solid #38BDF8"}}>
            {cs?(
              <div style={{textAlign:"center",padding:"44px 0"}}>
                <div style={{width:72,height:72,borderRadius:"50%",background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:30,margin:"0 auto 20px",color:"#fff"}}>✓</div>
                <h2 style={{fontSize:30,fontWeight:800,color:"#0F172A",marginBottom:9}}>Message Sent!</h2>
                <p style={{color:"#64748B",fontSize:14.5}}>We will get back to you within 24 hours.</p>
                <button className="bp" style={{marginTop:22}} onClick={()=>setCs(false)}>Send Another</button>
              </div>
            ):(
              <>
                <h3 style={{fontSize:24,fontWeight:800,color:"#0F172A",marginBottom:24}}>Send Us a Message</h3>
                <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"1fr 1fr",gap:13,marginBottom:13}}>
                  {[["name","Full Name"],["email","Email Address"]].map(([k,pl])=>(
                    <div key={k}>
                      <label style={{display:"block",fontSize:10.5,color:"#94A3B8",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:5}}>{pl}</label>
                      <input className="inp" placeholder={pl} value={cf[k]} onChange={e=>setCf({...cf,[k]:e.target.value})}/>
                    </div>
                  ))}
                </div>
                <div style={{marginBottom:13}}>
                  <label style={{display:"block",fontSize:10.5,color:"#94A3B8",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:5}}>Phone</label>
                  <input className="inp" placeholder="Your phone number" value={cf.phone} onChange={e=>setCf({...cf,phone:e.target.value})}/>
                </div>
                <div style={{marginBottom:13}}>
                  <label style={{display:"block",fontSize:10.5,color:"#94A3B8",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:5}}>Subject</label>
                  <select className="inp" value={cf.sub} onChange={e=>setCf({...cf,sub:e.target.value})}>
                    {["Hiring Enquiry","Job Application","Software Development","Payroll Services","BPO Services","General Enquiry"].map(o=><option key={o}>{o}</option>)}
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div style={{marginBottom:24}}>
                  <label style={{display:"block",fontSize:10.5,color:"#94A3B8",fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:1,textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:5}}>Message</label>
                  <textarea className="inp" rows={5} style={{resize:"vertical"}} placeholder="Tell us about your requirement..." value={cf.msg} onChange={e=>setCf({...cf,msg:e.target.value})}/>
                </div>
                <button className="bp" style={{width:"100%",justifyContent:"center",padding:14,fontSize:14}} onClick={()=>{if(cf.name&&cf.email)setCs(true);else alert("Please fill Name and Email!");}}>Send Message →</button>
              </>
            )}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  );

  const Footer=()=>(
    <footer style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7,#075985)",color:"#fff",padding:"56px 40px 28px"}}>
      <div style={{maxWidth:1320,margin:"0 auto"}}>
        <div style={{display:"grid",gridTemplateColumns:"2fr 1fr 1fr 1.5fr",gap:44,marginBottom:44}}>
          <div>
            <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10,marginBottom:16,cursor:"pointer"}} onClick={()=>go("Home")}>
              <img src={LOGO} alt="A-CONNEXION" style={{height:44,width:"auto",objectFit:"contain",display:"block",filter:"brightness(0) invert(1)"}}/>
              <div>
                <div style={{fontWeight:900,fontSize:16,color:"#fff",letterSpacing:1,lineHeight:1.1}}>A-CONNEXION</div>
                <div style={{fontWeight:600,fontSize:9,color:"rgba(186,230,253,0.8)",letterSpacing:2,textTransform:"uppercase",marginTop:2}}>TECH INTERNATIONAL</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <p style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.52)",fontSize:12.5,lineHeight:1.82,maxWidth:270}}>Strategic recruitment & talent advisory. Est. 2005. PAN India & International.</p>
          </div>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10.5,fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:2,color:"rgba(186,230,253,0.65)",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:16}}>Navigation</div>
            {NAV.map(n=>(<div key={n} style={{marginBottom:10}}><span onClick={()=>go(n)} style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.52)",fontSize:12.5,cursor:"pointer"}} onMouseEnter={e=>e.target.style.color="#fff"} onMouseLeave={e=>e.target.style.color="rgba(255,255,255,0.52)"}>{n}</span></div>))}
          </div>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10.5,fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:2,color:"rgba(186,230,253,0.65)",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:16}}>Services</div>
            {["IT Recruitment","Non-IT Hiring","Payroll Management","Software Development","BPO & Outsourcing"].map(s=>(<div key={s} style={{marginBottom:10}}><span onClick={()=>go("Services")} style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.65)",fontSize:12.5,cursor:"pointer",transition:"color 0.2s"}} onMouseEnter={e=>e.target.style.color="#fff"} onMouseLeave={e=>e.target.style.color="rgba(255,255,255,0.65)"}>{s}</span></div>))}
          </div>
          <div>
            <div style={{fontSize:10.5,fontWeight:700,letterSpacing:2,color:"rgba(186,230,253,0.65)",textTransform:"uppercase",marginBottom:16}}>Contact</div>
            {["+91 9869043500","+91 8897123500","info@aconnexion.in","Vashi, Navi Mumbai - 400704"].map(v=>(<div key={v} style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.52)",fontSize:12,marginBottom:8}}>{v}</div>))}
            <a href="https://wa.me/919869043500" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer"><button className="bwa" style={{marginTop:10,padding:"8px 18px",fontSize:12}}>💬 WhatsApp</button></a>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style={{borderTop:"1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)",paddingTop:22,display:"flex",justifyContent:"space-between",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:10}}>
          <div style={{color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.33)",fontSize:11.5}}>© 2025 A-CONNEXION Tech International. All rights reserved.</div>
          <div style={{fontSize:11.5,color:"rgba(255,255,255,0.33)"}}>Vashi, Navi Mumbai · Est. 2005</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </footer>
  );

  const Chatbot=()=>(
    <div style={{position:"fixed",bottom:24,right:24,zIndex:1000}}>
      {co&&(
        <div style={{position:"absolute",bottom:68,right:0,width:340,background:"#fff",borderRadius:22,boxShadow:"0 16px 52px rgba(14,165,233,0.18)",border:"1px solid #BAE6FD",overflow:"hidden"}}>
          <div style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#0284C7,#075985)",padding:"14px 16px",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"space-between"}}>
            <div style={{display:"flex",alignItems:"center",gap:10}}>
              <div style={{width:38,height:38,background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.18)",borderRadius:11,display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",fontSize:17}}>🎯</div>
              <div>
                <div style={{color:"#fff",fontWeight:700,fontSize:13.5}}>A-CONNEXION Support</div>
                <div style={{color:"rgba(186,230,253,0.78)",fontSize:10,marginTop:2}}>🟢 Online · Responds in minutes</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <button onClick={()=>setCo(false)} style={{background:"rgba(255,255,255,0.12)",border:"none",color:"#fff",cursor:"pointer",width:26,height:26,borderRadius:7,fontSize:13,fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}>✕</button>
          </div>
          <div style={{maxHeight:290,overflowY:"auto",padding:13,display:"flex",flexDirection:"column",gap:10,background:"#F8FAFF"}}>
            {msgs.map((m,i)=>(
              <div key={i} style={{alignSelf:m.from==="user"?"flex-end":"flex-start",maxWidth:"84%"}}>
                <div style={{background:m.from==="user"?"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)":"#fff",color:m.from==="user"?"#fff":"#0F172A",border:m.from==="bot"?"1px solid #BAE6FD":"none",borderRadius:m.from==="user"?"16px 16px 4px 16px":"16px 16px 16px 4px",padding:"9px 13px",fontSize:12.5,lineHeight:1.55,whiteSpace:"pre-wrap"}}>{m.text}</div>
                {m.quick&&<div style={{display:"flex",flexWrap:"wrap",gap:5,marginTop:6}}>{m.quick.map(q=>(<button key={q} onClick={()=>chat(q)} style={{background:"#fff",border:"1.5px solid #BAE6FD",color:"#0284C7",padding:"4px 10px",borderRadius:50,cursor:"pointer",fontWeight:600,fontSize:10.5,fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}>{q}</button>))}</div>}
              </div>
            ))}
            {tp&&<div style={{alignSelf:"flex-start",background:"#fff",border:"1px solid #BAE6FD",borderRadius:"16px 16px 16px 4px",padding:"10px 14px",display:"flex",gap:4}}>{[0,0.15,0.3].map((d,i)=>(<div key={i} style={{width:7,height:7,borderRadius:"50%",background:"#38BDF8",animation:"bn 1s "+d+"s infinite"}}/>))}</div>}
            <div ref={ce}/>
          </div>
          <div style={{padding:"9px 11px",borderTop:"1px solid #E0F2FE",display:"flex",gap:7,background:"#fff"}}>
            <input value={ci} onChange={e=>setCi(e.target.value)} onKeyDown={e=>e.key==="Enter"&&chat()} placeholder="Type your message..." style={{flex:1,background:"#F8FAFF",border:"1.5px solid #BAE6FD",color:"#0F172A",padding:"9px 13px",borderRadius:50,fontSize:12.5,outline:"none",fontFamily:"Poppins,sans-serif"}}/>
            <button onClick={()=>chat()} style={{background:"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",color:"#fff",border:"none",borderRadius:"50%",width:38,height:38,cursor:"pointer",fontSize:15}}>→</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      )}
      <button onClick={()=>setCo(o=>!o)} style={{width:54,height:54,borderRadius:"50%",background:co?"#fff":"linear-gradient(135deg,#38BDF8,#0284C7)",border:co?"2px solid #38BDF8":"none",color:co?"#0284C7":"#fff",cursor:"pointer",fontSize:22,boxShadow:"0 5px 20px rgba(56,189,248,0.45)",display:"flex",alignItems:"center",justifyContent:"center",transition:"all 0.25s"}}>
        {co?"✕":"💬"}
      </button>
    </div>
  );

  const P={Home,Services,About,Careers,Contact}[pg]||Home;
  return(
    <div style={{minHeight:"100vh",background:"#F0F9FF"}}>
      <Navbar/>
      <P/>
      <Footer/>
      <Chatbot/>
    </div>
  );
}
